title: DTO
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from DTO, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Why Goldman Sachs says U.S. stocks are vulnerable to heavy selling this week
Japanese Prime Minister Takaichi's ruling LDP set to secure supermajority in Lower House: NHK
items.description: PM Takaichi's Liberal Democratic Party is likely to win between 274-328 seats in the Lower House, higher than the 233 seats needed for a majority, NHK...

items.title: Hong Kong media baron and pro-democracy activist Jimmy Lai sentenced to 20 years in prison
items.description: Lai, who had pleaded not guilty to all charges, was among the first prominent figures arrested under Beijing's security law in August 2020.

items.title: Dow retreats below 50,000 milestone as new week kicks off — live updates
Economic calendar: No fewer than four Fed events on the schedule for Monday
What Gen Z’s peculiar obsession with 2016 means for stock-market investors
Hims & Hers shares tumbling after U-turn on plans for oral Wegovy competitor
Federal judge orders Fulton County Georgia election case documents unsealed by Tuesday
items.description: The FBI last month raided an election facility central to President Donald Trump's debunked claims of fraud in the 2020 election.

items.title: Epstein files: Congress members call for Trump Commerce chief Lutnick to resign, or be fired
items.description: Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick previously said on a podcast he had cut ties with the notorious sex offender since an initial 2005 encounter.

items.title: Cuba says international airlines can no longer refuel there as Trump turns up the pressure
items.description: The update comes shortly after U.S. President Donald Trump threatened tariffs on any country that supplies Cuba with oil.
